messages.content: I need list of cheap audio modules, like based on MAX9814 or PAM8403

Here is a list of inexpensive audio modules that are based on the MAX9814 or PAM8403:

1. MAX9814 Microphone Amplifier Module - This module is designed around the MAX9814 microphone amplifier chip and is suitable for audio applications that require high-quality sound capture. It is available at a reasonable price.

2. PAM8403 Audio Amplifier Module - This compact module features the PAM8403 chip, a small but powerful 3W class-D audio amplifier. It has excellent audio quality and is commonly used in small speakers or DIY audio projects.

3. PAM8406 Audio Amplifier Module - Similar to the PAM8403 module, the PAM8406 module offers a higher power output with a 5W class-D audio amplifier. It is a good choice for mid-range audio applications that require more power.

4. MAX9812 Microphone Amplifier Module - This module is based on the MAX9812 chip, offering similar features to the MAX9814 module. It is an affordable option for projects that require audio capturing capabilities.

5. PAM8008 Audio Amplifier Module - The PAM8008 module is another economic choice for audio amplification needs. It has an output power of 3W and is commonly used in battery-powered speakers, Bluetooth speakers, and other portable audio devices.

These modules can be easily found on popular online electronics component platforms or hobbyist websites. Please note that prices may vary depending on the supplier and any additional features the modules may offer.
more

Certainly! Here are a few more inexpensive audio modules based on different audio chips:

6. PAM8409 Audio Amplifier Module - The PAM8409 module features a 5W stereo class-D audio amplifier, making it suitable for applications that require higher power output. It is commonly used in multimedia speakers, soundbars, and other audio systems.

7. PAM8610 Audio Amplifier Module - This module is based on the PAM8610 chip, which is a 15W stereo class-D audio amplifier. It provides higher power output compared to some of the other modules and is often used in larger audio projects.

8. TDA7492P Audio Amplifier Module - The TDA7492P module is based on the TDA7492P chip and provides a 2x50W output power. It is commonly used for building high-power audio amplifiers or DIY sound systems.

9. LM386 Audio Amplifier Module - The LM386 module is based on the LM386 chip, a low-power, mono audio amplifier. It is suitable for compact and low-power audio applications like portable radios, intercom systems, and small speakers.

10. PCM5102A DAC Audio Module - The PCM5102A module is a digital-to-analog converter (DAC) module based on the PCM5102A chip. It allows for high-quality audio playback and is often used in audio streaming devices and audio player systems.

These modules offer a range of features and power outputs, ensuring there is an affordable option available to suit your specific audio project requirements.
more

Certainly! Here are a few more inexpensive audio modules:

11. YX5200-24SS Audio Player Module - The YX5200-24SS module is a low-cost audio player module that supports various audio formats, including MP3 and WAV. It can be easily integrated into projects like music players, audio greeting cards, or DIY sound effects devices.

12. ISD1820 Sound/Voice Recorder and Playback Module - The ISD1820 module is a compact sound recorder and playback module. It allows you to record and play back audio messages or sounds. It is commonly used in voice recording applications, talking toys, and other interactive projects.

13. XY-FST Wireless Audio Transmitter and Receiver Module - The XY-FST module is an affordable wireless audio transmitter and receiver module. It operates in the 433MHz frequency range and can transmit audio wirelessly over short distances. It is often used in DIY wireless audio systems or remote audio transmission projects.

14. DFPlayer Mini MP3 Player Module - The DFPlayer Mini module is a small and inexpensive MP3 player module that supports TF card storage. It can play audio files directly from a microSD card and has built-in amplifier capabilities. It is commonly used in small music players, sound effects devices, or interactive projects.

15. SPH0645LM4H Microphone Module - The SPH0645LM4H module is a cost-effective digital MEMS microphone module. It comes with built-in preamplifier circuitry and digital output, making it easy to interface with various microcontrollers. It is commonly used in voice recognition systems, IoT devices, or audio recording applications.

These modules should provide you with additional options for your audio projects at affordable prices. Make sure to check the specifications and features of each module before making a purchase to ensure they meet your specific requirements.
more "Microphone Amplifier Module"

Certainly! Here are a few more inexpensive microphone amplifier modules:

16. MAX4466 Microphone Amplifier Module - The MAX4466 module is based on the MAX4466 chip, which is a low-noise microphone amplifier. It provides a gain of up to 125x and is suitable for applications that require high-quality sound capture. It is commonly used in audio recording systems, voice recognition projects, or intercom systems.

17. AGC Microphone Amplifier Module - This module features an automatic gain control (AGC) microphone amplifier circuit. It dynamically adjusts the gain based on the input sound level, ensuring consistent audio output even with varying input volumes. It is commonly used in voice-activated systems, audio processing projects, or noise-cancelling applications.

18. LM358 Microphone Amplifier Module - The LM358 module is based on the LM358 operational amplifier chip. It offers a simple and cost-effective solution for microphone amplification. It is commonly used in small audio projects, low-power amplification needs, or educational experiments.

19. ADMP401 MEMS Microphone Module - The ADMP401 module is a low-cost microphone module based on the ADMP401 MEMS microphone. It offers high-performance sound capture in a compact form factor. It is commonly used in sensor arrays, noise measurement systems, or portable audio recorders.

20. INA217 Microphone Preamplifier Module - The INA217 module is based on the INA217 instrumentation amplifier chip, which provides low-noise, high-precision microphone amplification. It offers adjustable gain and is commonly used in professional audio applications, studio recording setups, or audio mixing equipment.

These microphone amplifier modules provide different features and performance levels, allowing you to choose the one that best fits your project requirements while remaining budget-friendly.
more “Microphone Amplifier Module”

Certainly! Here are a few more inexpensive microphone amplifier modules:

21. LM393 Microphone Sound Sensor Module - The LM393 module is a microphone sound sensor module that features an adjustable sensitivity. It can be used to detect sound levels and triggers based on the sound intensity. It is commonly used in sound-activated lighting systems, voice-activated projects, or sound recognition applications.

22. MP34DT01 Digital MEMS Microphone Module - The MP34DT01 module is a small digital MEMS microphone module that offers excellent audio quality and low power consumption. It provides a digital output and is commonly used in applications such as voice assistants, noise measurement systems, or portable recording devices.

23. MAX9812 Microphone Amplifier Module - The MAX9812 module is based on the MAX9812 chip, which is a low-noise microphone amplifier with automatic gain control (AGC). It allows for adjustable gain and provides consistent audio levels, even with varying input volumes. It is commonly used in audio recording, voice recognition, or communication systems.

24. ADMP401 Microphone Amplifier Breakout Board - The ADMP401 breakout board is a small and affordable microphone amplifier module that features the ADMP401 microphone. It provides a high signal-to-noise ratio and is commonly used in noise reduction systems, audio processing projects, or voice detection devices.

25. ISD1820 Voice Recording and Playback Module - The ISD1820 module is a versatile voice recording and playback module that includes a built-in microphone amplifier. It allows you to record and play back sounds or voice messages. It is commonly used in voice recording devices, electronic greeting cards, or interactive projects.

These microphone amplifier modules offer a range of features and performance capabilities. They can be easily integrated into various projects, providing a cost-effective solution for sound capture and amplification needs.
more “Microphone Amplifier Module”

Certainly! Here are a few more inexpensive microphone amplifier modules:

26. KY-038 Microphone Sound Sensor Module - The KY-038 module is a simple microphone sound sensor module with analog output. It provides a signal output that varies with sound intensity. It is commonly used in sound-activated projects, audio level monitoring, or noise detection systems.

27. ADMP401 MEMS Microphone Amplifier Module - The ADMP401 MEMS microphone amplifier module features the ADMP401 MEMS microphone, which provides excellent sound quality and a low noise floor. It offers a compact design and is commonly used in voice recognition applications, audio recording devices, or noise measurement systems.

28. PAM8406 Microphone Amplifier Module - The PAM8406 module is a versatile audio amplifier module that can also be used as a microphone amplifier. It features a 5W class-D audio amplifier and offers good audio quality with low distortion. It is commonly used in mini speakers, DIY audio projects, or portable audio systems.

29. LM386 Microphone Amplifier Module - The LM386 module is a simple and low-cost audio amplifier module that can be easily used as a microphone amplifier. It provides adjustable gain and outputs audio directly to a speaker or headphone. It is commonly used in small audio applications, hobbyist projects, or educational experiments.

30. PCM1802 ADC Microphone Amplifier Module - The PCM1802 module is an analog-to-digital converter (ADC) microphone amplifier module. It allows for high-resolution audio input and conversion to digital signals. It is commonly used in audio recording systems, digital audio workstations (DAWs), or audio processing projects.

These microphone amplifier modules offer different characteristics and features, allowing you to find a suitable option for your specific requirements while keeping costs low.
more “MEMS Microphone Amplifier Module”

Certainly! Here are a few more inexpensive MEMS microphone amplifier modules:

31. SPW2430 MEMS Microphone Amplifier Module - The SPW2430 module is a MEMS microphone amplifier module that provides a compact and cost-effective solution for sound capture. It features a built-in amplifier circuit and offers excellent sensitivity and signal-to-noise ratio. It is commonly used in voice recognition systems, audio recording devices, or noise monitoring applications.

32. INMP441 MEMS Microphone Amplifier Module - The INMP441 module is a low-power MEMS microphone amplifier module that integrates a digital interface for easy integration with microcontrollers. It offers high signal quality and is widely used in applications such as smartphones, tablets, voice assistants, or IoT devices.

33. ADMP404 MEMS Microphone Amplifier Module - The ADMP404 module is a high-performance MEMS microphone amplifier module that provides excellent audio quality and low distortion. It offers a small form factor and low power consumption, making it suitable for portable audio solutions, noise-cancelling systems, or professional audio recording devices.

34. SPH0645 MEMS Microphone Amplifier Module - The SPH0645 module is an ultra-small MEMS microphone amplifier module that features a high signal-to-noise ratio and low power consumption. It provides high-quality sound capture and is commonly used in applications such as voice recognition, wearable devices, or small audio systems.

35. ICS-43434 MEMS Microphone Amplifier Module - The ICS-43434 module is a low-noise MEMS microphone amplifier module that offers a compact design and high sensitivity. It provides excellent audio performance and is often used in audio recording devices, smart speakers, or noise measurement systems.

These MEMS microphone amplifier modules offer reliable performance and are cost-effective options for various audio applications. Be sure to verify the specifications and features of each module to ensure they meet your specific project needs.
more simple "Audio Amplifier Module" like PAM8403

Certainly! Here are a few more simple audio amplifier modules similar to the PAM8403:

36. PAM8610 Audio Amplifier Module - The PAM8610 module is a compact and low-cost audio amplifier module. It features a 2x15W stereo class-D amplifier, offering higher power output compared to the PAM8403. It is commonly used in projects that require more audio amplification, such as speakers or audio systems.

37. PAM8406 Audio Amplifier Module - The PAM8406 module is similar to the PAM8403 in terms of size and cost, but it offers higher power output. It features a 5W class-D stereo amplifier, making it suitable for small audio systems, Bluetooth speakers, or headphone amplifiers.

38. TDA7297 Audio Amplifier Module - The TDA7297 module is a simple and cost-effective audio amplifier module. It features a dual-channel 15W per channel amplifier, offering good sound quality and power output. It is commonly used in DIY audio projects, small speakers, or car audio systems.

39. TDA2030A Audio Amplifier Module - The TDA2030A module is based on the TDA2030A chip, which is a popular audio amplifier chip known for its simplicity and reliability. It provides a single-channel 18W amplifier and is commonly used in low-power audio amplification applications.

40. TPA3118 Audio Amplifier Module - The TPA3118 module is a compact and affordable audio amplifier module. It utilizes the TPA3118 chip, which is a high-quality class-D amplifier. It provides 30W per channel power output and is commonly used in multimedia speakers, home audio systems, or DIY audio projects.

These audio amplifier modules offer simplicity and affordability while providing decent power output. They can be easily integrated into various audio projects or used as standalone amplifiers for different applications.

more Bluetooth

Certainly! Here are a few inexpensive Bluetooth audio amplifier modules:

46. TDA7492P Bluetooth Audio Amplifier Module - The TDA7492P module is a Bluetooth audio amplifier module that combines a high-quality audio amplifier with Bluetooth connectivity. It offers a dual-channel 2x50W output power and supports various audio input options. It is commonly used in Bluetooth speakers, DIY audio projects, or multimedia systems.

47. PAM8406 Bluetooth Audio Amplifier Module - The PAM8406 Bluetooth module combines a 5W+5W class-D audio amplifier with Bluetooth connectivity. It provides stereo output and is commonly used in small Bluetooth speakers, wireless audio systems, or portable multimedia projects.

48. TPA3116D2 Bluetooth Audio Amplifier Module - The TPA3116D2 module features a Bluetooth audio receiver and a high-performance audio amplifier based on the TPA3116D2 chip. It offers a stereo output of up to 50W+50W and supports multiple audio input options. It is commonly used in Bluetooth speakers, home audio systems, or car audio upgrades.

49. AZ-2 Bluetooth Audio Amplifier Module - The AZ-2 Bluetooth module is a compact and affordable solution that combines a Bluetooth audio receiver with a stereo audio amplifier. It offers a power output of up to 2x15W and can be easily integrated into various audio projects or speaker systems.

50. MT3608 Bluetooth Audio Amplifier Module - The MT3608 module is a compact and low-cost Bluetooth audio amplifier module. It features Bluetooth connectivity and a small audio amplifier suitable for low-power applications. It is commonly used in small Bluetooth-enabled speakers, headphones, or wearable audio devices.

These Bluetooth audio amplifier modules provide easy wireless audio connectivity along with amplification capabilities. They can be used for various audio projects, whether you want to create a Bluetooth speaker, upgrade an existing system, or build your own wireless audio solution.
